mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT group_id) FROM sys_notification
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT n.notice_id AS noticeId, n.title, n.content, n.notice_type AS noticeType, n.sender_id AS senderId, s.real_name AS senderName, n.receiver_id AS receiverId, n.is_read AS isRead, n.biz_type AS bizType, n.biz_id AS bizId, n.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_notification n LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON n.sender_id = s.user_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE n.receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY n.notice_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT n.receiver_id AS receiverId, u.real_name AS receiverName, u.user_name AS receiverUserName, IFNULL(n.is_read, 0) AS isRead, DATE_FORMAT(n.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS noticeTime FROM sys_notification n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.receiver_id = u.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE n.notice_id = #{noticeId} ORDER BY n.is_read ASC, n.receiver_id ASC

SELECT n.receiver_id AS receiverId, u.real_name AS receiverName, u.user_name AS receiverUserName, IFNULL(n.is_read, 0) AS isRead, DATE_FORMAT(n.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS noticeTime FROM sys_notification n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.receiver_id = u.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE n.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY n.is_read ASC, n.receiver_id ASC
